General.Name: Dominos PIZZA Enterprises Ltd
General.Description: Domino's Pizza Enterprises Limited operates retail food outlets. It holds franchise rights for the Domino's brand in Australia, New Zealand, Belgium, France, the Netherlands, Japan, Cambodia, Germany, Luxembourg, Taiwan, Denmark, Malaysia, and Singapore. The company also operates various stores. Domino's Pizza Enterprises Limited was founded in 1983 and is based in Brisbane, Australia.
